name: monitor-ux-refresh
description: Two independent UX redesign proposals for bin/bridge-monitor.mjs, adversarially critiqued by a third provider, then implemented exactly as specified and gated by typecheck+test.

phases.name: design_minimal
design_dashboard
critique
implement
phases.prompt:
Implement the following UI/UX spec for bin/bridge-monitor.mjs EXACTLY as written, in the repo at {{cwd}}. This is a zero-dependency ANSI TUI script (no new npm dependencies). Preserve all existing CLI flags and their exact semantics (--once, --run <id>, --interval <ms>, --no-color) and the SIGINT/SIGTERM cursor-restore behavior, and keep using listRuns/readRun from ../dist/workflows/run-state.js exactly as today (no changes to run-state.ts). Read the file first, then edit it in place.

Spec to implement:
{{results.critique}}

After editing, run `npm run typecheck` and `npm test` yourself and fix any failures before finishing. Do not touch any other files.
